visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a 2D animation of a cute pink baby-like character named 'Labu fairy' floating against a purple background filled with glowing hearts. It then cuts to a bald animated man sitting behind a wooden desk in a room with blue shelves and a bat picture. (2) The scene changes to the fairy in a grassy field plucking petals from a white daisy to determine if 'he likes me'. Detailed close-ups show the fingers pulling petals as text overlays appear. (3) The fairy holds a smartphone showing a photo of two men and a timer that rapidly counts up from 5 days to over 2 years, symbolizing the passage of time in a relationship. The fairy's eyes transform into hearts. (4) Two animated men sit on a couch; one mentions he just farted, leading to a high-contrast comedic reaction from the other, who appears shocked and angry against a dark, dramatic background. (5) The bald man returns to his desk, looking at a phone with romantic text messages before hunched over to 'vomit' a rainbow of colors, symbolizing his revulsion at the sweet messages.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 拉補仙子. [Logo]: 阿啾小劇場. (2) [Subtitle]: 是掌管人們戀愛情緒的仙子. 而拉補仙子也有分很多型態. (3) [Slogan]: 暗戀期. (4) [Subtitle]: 懷疑自己是不是喜歡對方. 或是懷疑對方是不是喜歡自己. (5) [Subtitle]: 他喜歡我拉補. 他不喜歡我拉補. (6) [Slogan]: 熱戀期. (7) [Subtitle]: 確定交往之後. 成天黏TT. 不管做什麼都想要在一起. (8) [Slogan]: 老夫老妻期. (9) [Subtitle]: 已經過了戀愛的時期. 變成如家人一般的存在. (10) [Variety]: 靠北你是吃三小也太臭. (11) [Subtitle]: 我跟學長的拉補仙子. 已經是老夫老妻期了. (12) [Subtitle]: 想你. 我也想你. (13) [Slogan]: 對熱戀期感到噁心的老人.

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Multiple animated characters including a bald man and a pink fairy.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Stylized animation backgrounds including a heart-patterned purple void, a green park with flowers, an indoor office with blue shelves, and a simple living room with a grey couch.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A bright, upbeat synthesized BGM starts immediately. A high-pitched, energetic female voice introduces the 'fairy', followed by a series of soft 'pop' sound effects. (2) A male narrator begins speaking at a fast pace with a friendly tone. Synchronized with the plucking animation, sharp but short percussive 'click' sounds are heard for every petal removed. (3) The tempo of the BGM stays consistent while the narration speeds up slightly to match the rapidly counting timer on the screen. (4) The audio cuts to a conversational dialogue between two men with a more casual, lower-pitched tone. A sudden, loud shouting vocal effect occurs with an exaggerated aggressive intensity, accompanied by a 'slam' impact SFX. (5) The male narrator returns to a conversational style. A light digital 'notification' bell rings. The clip ends with a long, wet gargling sound effect lasting several seconds, representing the character vomiting, which fades into a hard cut to silence.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Definition -> Classification -> Example -> Climax/Punchline.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video uses a fictional fairy character to humorously categorize and satirize the three main stages of a romantic relationship: the crush, the honeymoon phase, and the long-term 'old couple' phase, concluding with a comedic reaction of disgust towards overly sweet romance.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-production-value social media animation with clear character archetypes and rapid editing.
